summary: Video set to music. Aerial footage of a CBP Air and Marine Operations Black Hawk helicopter banking over a coastal city, two AMO boats throwing wakes across turquoise water filmed from a helicopter, and an agent in a tan uniform and a 'POLICE / Air and Marine Operations' vest and helmet watching helicopters fly overhead. A white cursive title 'Merry Christmas' and sparkle particle overlays appear throughout.

script.scene: Aerial shot of an AMO Black Hawk helicopter banking over a dense coastal city with the sea behind; white cursive title 'Merry Christmas' top-center; sparkle particles overlaid.
Top-down shot over blue water and green mangrove islets, with a sparkle overlay.
An AMO patrol boat moves across deep blue ocean throwing a white wake under a bright sky with sparkle particles.
Helicopter point-of-view (a crew helmet in frame) looking down as two boats run side by side across turquoise water, leaving foamy trails.
Ground shot from behind an agent in tan uniform and 'POLICE / Air and Marine Operations' vest and helmet, watching two helicopters fly over a green field; sparkle overlay continues.

notable_text: POLICE - Air and Marine Operations (agent patch)
